summary: Verification passed. FGame removed the strategic draw/wx event APIs, exposes the expected model-safe command/getter boundary, preserves selection and end-turn behavior, and the documentation accurately records the deferred Subtask 4 regression-test updates.
test_sufficiency_summary: Strategic builds passed. Full SSWTests was re-run after building dependent libraries and failed only on the 2 known stale Subtask 4 boundary assertions in tests/strategic/FGameHeaderDependencyTest.cpp.
documentation_accuracy: Documenter artifacts correctly describe the shipped FGame boundary, remaining GUI/event work in Subtasks 1 and 3, and the deferred Subtask 4 regression-test update.

tests_run.details: Fails only on 2 known stale Subtask 4 assertions in tests/strategic/FGameHeaderDependencyTest.cpp after dependent libraries are built.
